title: Routing, Selection, Translation, and Redundancy · Incident Case: Net Nat Pat
summary: Connect branch, headquarters, cloud, and internet routes while diagnosing asymmetry and failover. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net nat pat increment in a routed hybrid branch design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace static or dynamic NAT and PAT translations, direction, state, address conservation, and troubleshooting evidence.
Distinguish prefix length, administrative distance, and protocol metric in route-selection evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
